string 2: Urgh!
Damn...!
Well... How convenient.
That makes two fewer opponents we must face.

Why would the chosen ones ever bend the knee? 
That seems to be the greatest proof of all—

—proof that that which you believe in
exists only within your heads.

You simply cling onto this "divine will" as an excuse... 
all while leaving your fellow Digimon to die.

We shall never give up. It is our duty to save everyone, 
even those who have been abandoned by that divine will!

Our belief is in our own sense of justice—
and not in anything or anyone else.

Now, I must ask you to hand over that data.
Rest assured that we will use it for what is absolutely right!
That makes two fewer opponents we must face.

Now, I must ask you to hand over that data.
Rest assured that we will use it for what is absolutely right!

There is no such thing as "absolutely right" in this world!
What is right depends on the situation and circumstances...!
Pure sophistry!

That is the sort of thinking that allowed you to
take up arms against Digimon!

If words will not convince you, then it seems
we must resort to force.
Urgh...!
*panting*
...Ngh?
Kuga!
Would you stop this, already— Huh?
Parallelmon!

Fools... Did you really fail to notice me
watching you all this time?
Oh, no... They're too absorbed in their own battle!
And from there... Kuga will get caught in the blast!
Taaaaa!
Kueeeeee!
Oof...!
Dorumon!
Is... Is that guy... okay?
Don't worry. Kuga's just unconscious!
Ungh...!
Why... did you save him?

For all... the trouble... we caused you.
It was... Digimon who... destroyed your world, right?
That... wasn't just the Digimon.

Our world isn't so simple that it makes any sense to
act on a single answer. That's the tricky thing about it.

Why do you think we accompanied you through all this?
Because your words and actions proved that you're the same as us.
Thank you...
I'm happy... to hear you... say that.
I'm so glad...
...that I met... you...
Damn it...! Is this what you all wanted?!

Sear this image into your minds!
This is what happens when friends turn on each other!

Acting like your sense of justice is everything...
Have you no shame? There's something far more important!
I swore... on the day I went back to the public safety office...

I swore that I would try to help others... not just for
my own sake, but for all my fallen comrades...
I just wanted... to do what was right...
Why is it so hard... to do the right thing...?
Nnh...
YAAAAAH!
This... This is not what we wanted.
I know this isn't something an apology can fix...
We were wrong... We're so sorry... And...
Thank you... for saving us.
D-Dorumon...?

I could hear all your voices.
Your scattered hearts... have come together as one.
That bond has given me new life.

Let us march!
Now that we stand together, we have nothing to fear!

Let us go defeat Parallelmon,
and return to our original worlds!
